note: C-37/C-26 attested provenance chain. Every SHIPPED production component (what GitHub Pages serves) is listed with its content hash and the chain that produced it: the frozen specification it derives from, the policy bundle that gated it, the test evidence, the adversarial-verification result, and the NAMED OWNING ROLE answerable for it. verify/tests/61-provenance verifies (a) every shipped file is listed, (b) each hash matches the file on disk (a silent change to a shipped component breaks the chain and fails the build), and (c) the chain fields are non-empty. This is git-anchored and machine-reconstructible on demand. RESIDUAL (R-LEDGER, honest): the model+prompt-hash per commit is NOT cryptographically signed here; git history + this manifest are the append-only substitute. Full Runner-only signed provenance is the buildable upgrade.
policy_bundle_version: verify/ @ catalogue v2.0 (run.js + mutation.js + gate.js + tests/)

components.role: served page shell (pinned CDN + SRI, Babel entrypoint)
components.derives_from_spec: CLAUDE.md architecture section + DR-002 (CI gate) + Pinned CDN versions section
components.test_evidence: verify/tests/35-supply-chain (pin manifest), verify/tests/40-sri (integrity recompute), verify/tests/30-static-security (hardened links, http-only-localhost/w3.org)
components.adversarial_verification: Part-1 Phase-6 adversarial pass over the shell (SRI/error-handling/noscript); Track C egress verifier (verify/tests/62)

components.role: served crisis-atlas data + pure calculations (FROZEN content)
components.derives_from_spec: the frozen crisis-winners specification; golden data hash verify/golden/data-hash.json
components.test_evidence: verify/tests/10-data-invariants, verify/tests/20-golden-content (golden hash), verify/mutation.js (13 mutants, score 1.00), verify/tests/70-claims (Article X labels)
components.adversarial_verification: Part-1 Wave R convicted the 'Median max drawdown' label (corrected); mutation oracle attacks the pure math

components.role: served OPTIONAL gated status-API integration (no-ops without ?status-api)
components.derives_from_spec: INTEGRATION_NOTES.md + DASHBOARD_FEED_SPEC.md; the KEY_RE gating contract
components.test_evidence: verify/tests/30-static-security (KEY_RE-enforced, no-injection-sink, no-fabricated-success), verify/tests/62-security-surface (egress allowlist, gated fetch)
components.adversarial_verification: Track C injection/exfiltration seeds (corpus D7/D8) + verify/tests/62 egress verifier

reconstruction_control: verify/tests/61-provenance reconstructs the chain for every shipped component on every build and fails loudly if a component is unlisted or its hash drifted; the git history supplies which commit/model authored each change. A scheduled spot-reconstruction is the standing cadence (governance/mandate cadence table).
